summary: Pass MCP execute params directly to Client.Post/Put/Patch instead of marshaling once into []byte and letting the client marshal again.
reason: Client.{Post,Put,Patch} take `body any` and call json.Marshal internally; the previous json.Marshal(params) -> []byte chain caused a double encode, so POST/PUT/PATCH endpoints (account.login, order.add_items, etc.) received a base64 JSON string instead of the object payload they expected. Found by codex review.
